data.content:
### Subscribe to Webhooks

Source: https://github.com/calcom/cal.com/blob/main/packages/app-store/zapier/README.md

Subscribes to webhook events for real-time notifications.

```APIDOC
## POST /api/integrations/zapier/addSubscription

### Description
Subscribes to webhook events for real-time notifications.

### Method
POST

### Endpoint
/api/integrations/zapier/addSubscription

### Parameters
#### Query Parameters
- **apiKey** (string) - Required - API key for authentication.

#### Request Body
- **webhookUrl** (string) - Required - The URL to send webhook events to.
- **eventTriggers** (array) - Optional - A list of event triggers to subscribe to (e.g., ['booking.created', 'booking.updated']).

### Request Example
```json
{
  "webhookUrl": "https://example.com/webhook",
  "eventTriggers": ["booking.created"]
}
```

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **subscriptionId** (string) - The ID of the created subscription.

#### Response Example
```json
{
  "subscriptionId": "sub_abc123"
}
```
```

--------------------------------

### Unsubscribe from Webhooks

Source: https://github.com/calcom/cal.com/blob/main/packages/app-store/zapier/README.md

Unsubscribes from webhook events.

```APIDOC
## DELETE /api/integrations/zapier/deleteSubscription

### Description
Unsubscribes from webhook events.

### Method
DELETE

### Endpoint
/api/integrations/zapier/deleteSubscription

### Parameters
#### Query Parameters
- **apiKey** (string) - Required - API key for authentication.
- **subscriptionId** (string) - Required - The ID of the subscription to delete.

### Request Example
```
DELETE /api/integrations/zapier/deleteSubscription?apiKey=YOUR_API_KEY&subscriptionId=sub_abc123
```

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **message** (string) - Confirmation message.

#### Response Example
```json
{
  "message": "Subscription deleted successfully."
}
```
```

--------------------------------

### MEETING_STARTED Webhook

Source: https://github.com/calcom/cal.com/blob/main/docs/developing/guides/automation/webhooks.mdx

This webhook is triggered when a scheduled meeting begins. It includes comprehensive details about the meeting, attendees, and event type.

```APIDOC
## MEETING_STARTED Webhook

### Description
This webhook is triggered when a scheduled meeting begins. It includes comprehensive details about the meeting, attendees, and event type.

### Method
POST

### Endpoint
`/webhooks` (or your configured webhook URL)

### Request Body
- **triggerEvent** (string) - The type of event that triggered the webhook. Expected value: "MEETING_STARTED".
- **id** (integer) - The internal ID of the event.
- **uid** (string) - The unique identifier for the booking.
- **idempotencyKey** (string) - A unique key to prevent duplicate event processing.
- **userId** (integer) - The ID of the user who owns the event.
- **userPrimaryEmail** (string) - The primary email address of the event owner.
- **eventTypeId** (integer) - The ID of the event type.
- **title** (string) - The title of the meeting.
- **description** (string) - The description of the meeting.
- **customInputs** (object) - Any custom fields defined for the event type.
- **responses** (object) - User-provided responses to custom questions for the booking.
  - **[fieldName]** (object) - Represents a custom input field.
    - **label** (string) - The label of the custom input field.
    - **value** (any) - The value provided by the user (can be string, object, array, etc.).
    - **isHidden** (boolean) - Indicates if the field was hidden from the user.
- **startTime** (string) - The scheduled start time of the meeting (ISO 8601 format).
- **endTime** (string) - The scheduled end time of the meeting (ISO 8601 format).
- **location** (string) - The meeting location (e.g., "integrations:video-provider").
- **createdAt** (string) - The timestamp when the booking was created (ISO 8601 format).
- **updatedAt** (string) - The timestamp when the booking was last updated (ISO 8601 format).
- **status** (string) - The current status of the booking (e.g., "ACCEPTED").
- **paid** (boolean) - Indicates if the booking has been paid for.
- **destinationCalendarId** (any) - The ID of the calendar where the event was booked.
- **cancellationReason** (any) - Reason for cancellation, if applicable.
- **rejectionReason** (any) - Reason for rejection, if applicable.
- **reassignReason** (any) - Reason for reassignment, if applicable.
- **reassignById** (any) - The ID of the user to whom the booking was reassigned.
- **dynamicEventSlugRef** (any) - Reference for dynamic event slugs.
- **dynamicGroupSlugRef** (any) - Reference for dynamic group slugs.
- **rescheduled** (any) - Information about a rescheduled event.
- **fromReschedule** (any) - Indicates if this booking resulted from a reschedule.
- **recurringEventId** (any) - The ID of a recurring event, if applicable.
- **smsReminderNumber** (any) - Phone number for SMS reminders.
- **scheduledJobs** (array) - Information about scheduled background jobs.
- **metadata** (object) - Custom metadata associated with the booking.
- **isRecorded** (boolean) - Indicates if the meeting was recorded.
- **iCalUID** (string) - The iCal unique identifier for the event.
- **iCalSequence** (integer) - The iCal sequence number.
- **rating** (any) - The rating given for the event, if applicable.
- **ratingFeedback** (any) - Feedback associated with the rating.
- **noShowHost** (boolean) - Indicates if the host marked the event as no-show.
- **oneTimePassword** (any) - One-time password, if applicable.
- **cancelledBy** (any) - Who cancelled the event.
- **rescheduledBy** (any) - Who rescheduled the event.
- **creationSource** (string) - The source from which the event was created (e.g., "WEBAPP").
- **user** (object) - Details of the event owner.
  - **email** (string) - Email address.
  - **name** (string) - Name.
  - **timeZone** (string) - Time zone.
  - **username** (string) - Username.
- **attendees** (array) - A list of attendees for the meeting.
  - **id** (integer) - Attendee ID.
  - **email** (string) - Attendee email.
  - **name** (string) - Attendee name.
  - **timeZone** (string) - Attendee time zone.
  - **phoneNumber** (any) - Attendee phone number.
  - **locale** (string) - Attendee locale.
  - **bookingId** (integer) - The ID of the booking this attendee is part of.
  - **noShow** (boolean) - No-show status.
- **payment** (array) - Payment details for the booking.
- **references** (array) - References related to the booking.
- **appsStatus** (array) - Status of integrated applications.
  - **appName** (string) - Name of the application.

### Request Example
```json
{
  "triggerEvent": "MEETING_STARTED",
  "id": 100,
  "uid": "unique-booking-identifier",
  "idempotencyKey": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000",
  "userId": 10,
  "userPrimaryEmail": "organizer@example.com",
  "eventTypeId": 50,
  "title": "Strategy Session: Organizer & Guest",
  "description": "",
  "customInputs": {},
  "responses": {
    "name": {
      "label": "your_name",
      "value": "Guest User",
      "isHidden": false
    },
    "email": {
      "label": "email_address",
      "value": "guest@example.com",
      "isHidden": false
    },
    "attendeePhoneNumber": {
      "label": "phone_number",
      "isHidden": true
    },
    "location": {
      "label": "location",
      "value": {
        "optionValue": "",
        "value": "integrations:video-provider"
      },
      "isHidden": false
    },
    "title": {
      "label": "what_is_this_meeting_about",
      "isHidden": true
    },
    "notes": {
      "label": "additional_notes",
      "isHidden": false
    },
    "guests": {
      "label": "additional_guests",
      "value": [
        "additional-guest@example.com"
      ],
      "isHidden": false
    },
    "rescheduleReason": {
      "label": "reason_for_reschedule",
      "isHidden": false
    }
  },
  "startTime": "2024-01-01T10:00:00.000Z",
  "endTime": "2024-01-01T10:15:00.000Z",
  "location": "integrations:video-provider",
  "createdAt": "2024-01-01T09:45:00.000Z",
  "updatedAt": "2024-01-01T09:45:00.000Z",
  "status": "ACCEPTED",
  "paid": false,
  "destinationCalendarId": null,
  "cancellationReason": null,
  "rejectionReason": null,
  "reassignReason": null,
  "reassignById": null,
  "dynamicEventSlugRef": null,
  "dynamicGroupSlugRef": null,
  "rescheduled": null,
  "fromReschedule": null,
  "recurringEventId": null,
  "smsReminderNumber": null,
  "scheduledJobs": [],
  "metadata": {},
  "isRecorded": false,
  "iCalUID": "unique-id@example.com",
  "iCalSequence": 0,
  "rating": null,
  "ratingFeedback": null,
  "noShowHost": false,
  "oneTimePassword": null,
  "cancelledBy": null,
  "rescheduledBy": null,
  "creationSource": "WEBAPP",
  "user": {
    "email": "organizer@example.com",
    "name": "Organizer Name",
    "timeZone": "UTC",
    "username": "organizer-handle"
  },
  "attendees": [
    {
      "id": 101,
      "email": "guest@example.com",
      "name": "Guest User",
      "timeZone": "UTC",
      "phoneNumber": null,
      "locale": "en",
      "bookingId": 100,
      "noShow": false
    },
    {
      "id": 102,
      "email": "additional-guest@example.com",
      "name": "Additional Guest",
      "timeZone": "UTC",
      "phoneNumber": null,
      "locale": "en",
      "bookingId": 100,
      "noShow": false
    }
  ],
  "payment": [],
  "references": [],
  "appsStatus": [
    {
      "appName": "video-app"
    }
  ]
}
```

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **status** (string) - Indicates success, e.g., "OK".

#### Response Example
```json
{
  "status": "OK"
}
```
```
